# Examples

<!-- generated by tools/generate_docs.py; edit examples/manifest.toml or example README files instead -->

Public examples are indexed from `examples/manifest.toml`.

## Generate

From the repository root:

```powershell
uv run python tools\generate_docs.py
```

### `pcbdoc`

| Example | Areas | Summary | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`hello_pcbdoc`](../../examples/hello_pcbdoc/README.md)<br>Create a PcbDoc hello example | pcbdoc | Generate a PcbDoc programmatically, create a rectangular board outline from explicit polygon vertices, place top silkscreen text, and save the board. | hello-world, generation, board-outline, polygon, silkscreen, pcb |
| [`pcbdoc_add_arc`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_arc/README.md)<br>Add PCB arcs | pcbdoc, mutation | Load a blank PcbDoc, add full-circle and partial arc primitives on multiple layers, and save the board. | pcbdoc, mutation, arc, full-circle, routing |
| [`pcbdoc_add_filled_region`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_filled_region/README.md)<br>Add filled PCB regions | pcbdoc, mutation | Load a blank PcbDoc, add copper regions, a region with a hole, and a keepout region, and save the board. | pcbdoc, mutation, region, filled-region, keepout |
| [`pcbdoc_add_free_3d_extruded`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_free_3d_extruded/README.md)<br>Add a free extruded 3D body to a PcbDoc | pcbdoc, 3d | Create a PcbDoc and add a board-level generic extruded 3D body from a polygon projection. | pcbdoc, 3d, component-body, extruded, generation |
| [`pcbdoc_add_free_3d_step`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_free_3d_step/README.md)<br>Add a free embedded STEP 3D body to a PcbDoc | pcbdoc, 3d | Create a PcbDoc, embed a STEP model from disk, infer its projection, and add it as a free board-level 3D body. | pcbdoc, 3d, component-body, embedded-model, step, generation |
| [`pcbdoc_add_pad`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_pad/README.md)<br>Add PCB pads | pcbdoc, mutation | Load a blank PcbDoc, add SMT pads, through-hole pads, and a non-plated through hole with explicit zero mask expansions, and save the board. | pcbdoc, mutation, pad, smt, through-hole, npth |
| [`pcbdoc_add_text`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_text/README.md)<br>Add PCB text primitives | pcbdoc, mutation | Load a blank PcbDoc, add stroke text, TrueType text, inverted text, mirrored text, and barcode text variants, and save the board. | pcbdoc, mutation, text, truetype, barcode, inverted-text |
| [`pcbdoc_add_track`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_track/README.md)<br>Add PCB tracks | pcbdoc, mutation | Load a blank PcbDoc, add tracks on copper, overlay, and mechanical layers with several widths and net assignments, and save the board. | pcbdoc, mutation, track, routing, nets |
| [`pcbdoc_bom`](../../examples/pcbdoc_bom/README.md)<br>Generate a BOM from PcbDoc components | pcbdoc, bom, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, iterate resolved PcbDoc components, and write all-component plus no-BOM-filtered BOM JSON. | pcbdoc, project, bom, components, parameters, placement |
| [`pcbdoc_extract_embedded_3d_models`](../../examples/pcbdoc_extract_embedded_3d_models/README.md)<br>Extract embedded PcbDoc 3D models | pcbdoc, design, 3d | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, open its PcbDoc, and write embedded STEP model payloads to disk. | pcbdoc, project, 3d, embedded-model, step, extraction |
| [`pcbdoc_extract_embedded_fonts`](../../examples/pcbdoc_extract_embedded_fonts/README.md)<br>Extract embedded PcbDoc fonts | pcbdoc, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, open its PcbDoc, and write embedded TrueType fonts to disk. | pcbdoc, project, font, embedded-asset, extraction |
| [`pcbdoc_extract_pcblib`](../../examples/pcbdoc_extract_pcblib/README.md)<br>Extract PcbLib footprints from a PcbDoc | pcbdoc, pcblib, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, extract placed PCB footprints to a combined PcbLib, and split them into one-footprint PcbLib files. | pcbdoc, pcblib, project, footprint, extraction, split-library |
| [`pcbdoc_insert_footprint_from_pcblib`](../../examples/pcbdoc_insert_footprint_from_pcblib/README.md)<br>Insert PcbLib footprints into a PcbDoc | pcbdoc, pcblib | Create a PcbDoc, place resistor footprints from an existing PcbLib, assign component parameters and pad nets, and save the board. | pcbdoc, pcblib, footprint, component, placement, parameters |
| [`pcbdoc_insert_nets_route`](../../examples/pcbdoc_insert_nets_route/README.md)<br>Insert footprints and route PCB nets | pcbdoc, pcblib | Create a PcbDoc, insert connector and resistor footprints from PcbLib assets, assign pad nets, and add routed tracks plus a via. | pcbdoc, pcblib, footprint, routing, nets, tracks |
| [`pcbdoc_netclass_svg`](../../examples/pcbdoc_netclass_svg/README.md)<br>Render net-class-highlighted PcbDoc SVG review pages | pcbdoc, svg, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, render routed copper layers for each PCB net class, recolor SVG primitives from embedded net-class metadata, and write inline HTML review pages. | pcbdoc, svg, rendering, project, net-class, html |
| [`pcbdoc_stats`](../../examples/pcbdoc_stats/README.md)<br>Print PcbDoc board statistics | pcbdoc, design | Load the loz-old-man project with AltiumDesign, open its PcbDoc, and print board outline, drill, slot, primitive-width, and resolved layer-stack statistics. | pcbdoc, project, statistics, board-outline, drills, slots |
| [`pcbdoc_svg`](../../examples/pcbdoc_svg/README.md)<br>Render PcbDoc layers to SVG | pcbdoc, svg, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, open its PcbDoc, and write one SVG per visible PCB layer plus a separate board-outline SVG. | pcbdoc, svg, rendering, project, layers, board-outline |

| [`pcblib_footprint_svg`](../../examples/pcblib_footprint_svg/README.md)<br>Render PcbLib footprints to SVG | pcblib, svg | Load an existing PcbLib, iterate its footprints, and write composed plus per-layer SVG files for each footprint. | library, footprint, svg, rendering, layers |

| [`pcblib_synthesize_power_resistor_lib`](../../examples/pcblib_synthesize_power_resistor_lib/README.md)<br>Synthesize power-resistor PcbLibs with generated STEP models | pcblib, 3d | Generate SQP20 through-hole resistor footprints, synthesize value-specific STEP models with dot-matrix markings, embed the models, and save one PcbLib per part. | generation, library, footprint, through-hole, embedded-model, step |

| [`schdoc_add_differential_pair`](../../examples/schdoc_add_differential_pair/README.md)<br>Add differential-pair directives to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached differential-pair directives with hidden child parameters through owner links, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, directive, differential-pair |
| [`schdoc_add_elliptical_arc_and_ellipse`](../../examples/schdoc_add_elliptical_arc_and_ellipse/README.md)<br>Add an elliptical arc and ellipse to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached ellipses plus detached elliptical arcs, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, elliptical-arc, ellipse, drawing-tools |
| [`schdoc_add_embedded_image`](../../examples/schdoc_add_embedded_image/README.md)<br>Add an embedded image to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create one detached embedded image, add it to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, image, embedded-image, storage |

| [`schdoc_add_harness_connector`](../../examples/schdoc_add_harness_connector/README.md)<br>Add a harness connector group to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, harness | Load a blank schematic, create a connector-owned harness group plus matching port and signal harness, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, harness, connector, ownership |
| [`schdoc_add_line`](../../examples/schdoc_add_line/README.md)<br>Add line segments to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached plain line segments, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, line, drawing-tools |
| [`schdoc_add_note`](../../examples/schdoc_add_note/README.md)<br>Add a note to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load an existing schematic, create one detached note, add it to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, note, blank-template |
| [`schdoc_add_off_sheet_connector`](../../examples/schdoc_add_off_sheet_connector/README.md)<br>Add an off-sheet connector to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached left and right off-sheet connectors, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, off-sheet-connector, connectivity |
| [`schdoc_add_parameter_set`](../../examples/schdoc_add_parameter_set/README.md)<br>Add parameter-set directives to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached parameter-set directives with child parameters through owner links, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, directive, parameter-set |
| [`schdoc_add_polygon`](../../examples/schdoc_add_polygon/README.md)<br>Add polygons to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached polygons with different point counts and fill modes, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, polygon, drawing-tools, fill |
| [`schdoc_add_polyline`](../../examples/schdoc_add_polyline/README.md)<br>Add polylines to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached polylines with endpoint markers, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, polyline, drawing-tools, line-endings |
| [`schdoc_add_port`](../../examples/schdoc_add_port/README.md)<br>Add ports to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached hierarchical ports with several styles and I/O types, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, port, connectivity, hierarchy |
| [`schdoc_add_power_port`](../../examples/schdoc_add_power_port/README.md)<br>Add power ports to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached built-in power-port symbols with several styles, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, power-port, connectivity |
| [`schdoc_add_rectangle_and_rounded_rectangle`](../../examples/schdoc_add_rectangle_and_rounded_rectangle/README.md)<br>Add rectangles and rounded rectangles to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached rectangles plus detached rounded rectangles, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, rectangle, rounded-rectangle, drawing-tools |
| [`schdoc_add_sheet_symbol`](../../examples/schdoc_add_sheet_symbol/README.md)<br>Add sheet symbols to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, hierarchy | Load a blank schematic, create detached sheet symbols with detached entries and labels, add the top-level groups to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, sheet-symbol, sheet-entry, hierarchy |
| [`schdoc_add_text_frame`](../../examples/schdoc_add_text_frame/README.md)<br>Add text frames to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create several detached text frames with different alignments, border widths, and fonts, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, text-frame, font, geometry |
| [`schdoc_add_text_string`](../../examples/schdoc_add_text_string/README.md)<br>Add text strings to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create several detached text strings with different justifications, orientations, and fonts, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, text-string, font, geometry |
| [`schdoc_add_wire_and_net_label`](../../examples/schdoc_add_wire_and_net_label/README.md)<br>Add wires and net labels to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create one detached wire path plus one matching detached net label, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, wire, net-label, connectivity |
| [`schdoc_apply_dynamic_template`](../../examples/schdoc_apply_dynamic_template/README.md)<br>Apply a generated title-block template | schdoc, mutation, template | Build title-block graphics from Python, keep Altium parameter expressions in the generated text frames, write project parameters and variant context to PrjPcb, and apply the template to blank ANSI B and D schematics. | schdoc, mutation, template, dynamic-template, title-block, schdot |
| [`schdoc_apply_template`](../../examples/schdoc_apply_template/README.md)<br>Apply a SchDot template to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, template | Open a schematic, clear its existing template graphics, apply a SchDot template from shared assets, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, template, schdot, title-block |
| [`schdoc_clean`](../../examples/schdoc_clean/README.md)<br>Clean and normalize project schematics | schdoc, mutation | Open every Hydroscope schematic, iterate through components and sheet-level records, normalize fonts, colors, fills, and line widths, and save cleaned SchDoc copies. | schdoc, mutation, clean, normalize, project |
| [`schdoc_clear_template`](../../examples/schdoc_clear_template/README.md)<br>Clear template graphics from an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, template | Open a schematic with embedded template graphics, remove the template record and template-owned objects, clear sheet template metadata, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, template, title-block |
| [`schdoc_extract_images`](../../examples/schdoc_extract_images/README.md)<br>Extract embedded images from a SchDoc | schdoc, asset-extraction, image | Open a schematic, find embedded IMAGE records, write each embedded payload using a detected native extension, and save a JSON extraction manifest. | schdoc, image, embedded-image, asset-extraction |
| [`schdoc_extract_schlib`](../../examples/schdoc_extract_schlib/README.md)<br>Extract SchLibs from a SchDoc | schdoc, schlib, asset-extraction | Extract placed component symbols from a schematic as a combined SchLib, split DBLib-ready SchLibs with metadata/model records stripped, and split SchLibs with parameters and implementations preserved. | schdoc, schlib, component, symbol-extraction, dblib |
| [`schdoc_extract_template`](../../examples/schdoc_extract_template/README.md)<br>Extract an embedded SchDoc template to SchDot | schdoc, mutation, template | Open a schematic with an embedded template, extract the template graphics back to a standalone SchDot, and save the extracted template. | schdoc, mutation, template, schdot, title-block, extract |
| [`schdoc_insert_dblib_style`](../../examples/schdoc_insert_dblib_style/README.md)<br>Insert DBLib-style components from a SchLib symbol | schdoc, schlib, mutation | Place generic resistor symbols from R_2P.Schlib, inject DB-resolved parameters and footprint implementations, and write a project containing the SchDoc and PcbLib. | schdoc, schlib, component, dblib-style, parameters, footprint |
| [`schdoc_move_note`](../../examples/schdoc_move_note/README.md)<br>Move an existing note in a SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Open a schematic with one note, move it through the public bounds helper, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, note, geometry, move |
| [`schdoc_mutate_harness_connector`](../../examples/schdoc_mutate_harness_connector/README.md)<br>Mutate an existing harness connector group in a SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, harness | Build a baseline harness connector group, mutate entry text, colors, fonts, signal harnesses, and the type label, then save the result. | schdoc, mutation, harness, connector, ownership |
| [`schdoc_mutate_sheet_symbol`](../../examples/schdoc_mutate_sheet_symbol/README.md)<br>Mutate an existing sheet symbol group in a SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, hierarchy | Open a schematic with one existing sheet symbol group, rename and reorder entries, replace the name and file labels, add and remove entries, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, sheet-symbol, sheet-entry, hierarchy |
| [`schdoc_note_command`](../../examples/schdoc_note_command/README.md)<br>Mutate and delete existing notes in a SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Open a schematic with existing notes, change one note font in place, delete another note, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, notes, delete, font |
| [`schdoc_svg`](../../examples/schdoc_svg/README.md)<br>Render project schematics to SVG | schdoc, svg, prjpcb | Open the Hydroscope PrjPcb, pass project parameters into the schematic SVG renderer, and write one SVG per schematic page. | schdoc, svg, rendering, project, parameters |
| [`schlib_svg`](../../examples/schlib_svg/README.md)<br>Extract and render SchLib symbols to SVG | schdoc, schlib, svg | Extract a combined SchLib from the RT Super C1 schematic, iterate every symbol and symbol part, render each part to SVG, and write a manifest of generated symbol artwork. | schdoc, schlib, svg, rendering, symbol-extraction, multipart |

| [`schdoc_add_port`](../../examples/schdoc_add_port/README.md)<br>Add ports to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached hierarchical ports with several styles and I/O types, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, port, connectivity, hierarchy |
| [`schdoc_add_arc_and_full_circle`](../../examples/schdoc_add_arc_and_full_circle/README.md)<br>Add an arc and a full circle to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create one detached arc plus one detached full circle, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, arc, full-circle, drawing-tools |
| [`schdoc_add_elliptical_arc_and_ellipse`](../../examples/schdoc_add_elliptical_arc_and_ellipse/README.md)<br>Add an elliptical arc and ellipse to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached ellipses plus detached elliptical arcs, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, elliptical-arc, ellipse, drawing-tools |
| [`schdoc_add_line`](../../examples/schdoc_add_line/README.md)<br>Add line segments to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached plain line segments, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, line, drawing-tools |

| [`schdoc_add_polyline`](../../examples/schdoc_add_polyline/README.md)<br>Add polylines to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached polylines with endpoint markers, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, polyline, drawing-tools, line-endings |
| [`schdoc_add_polygon`](../../examples/schdoc_add_polygon/README.md)<br>Add polygons to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached polygons with different point counts and fill modes, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, polygon, drawing-tools, fill |
| [`schdoc_add_bezier`](../../examples/schdoc_add_bezier/README.md)<br>Add bezier curves to an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation | Load a blank schematic, create detached bezier curves with single and chained segments, add them to the document, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, bezier, drawing-tools, curves |
| [`hello_pcbdoc`](../../examples/hello_pcbdoc/README.md)<br>Create a PcbDoc hello example | pcbdoc | Generate a PcbDoc programmatically, create a rectangular board outline from explicit polygon vertices, place top silkscreen text, and save the board. | hello-world, generation, board-outline, polygon, silkscreen, pcb |

| [`pcbdoc_svg`](../../examples/pcbdoc_svg/README.md)<br>Render PcbDoc layers to SVG | pcbdoc, svg, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, open its PcbDoc, and write one SVG per visible PCB layer plus a separate board-outline SVG. | pcbdoc, svg, rendering, project, layers, board-outline |
| [`pcbdoc_netclass_svg`](../../examples/pcbdoc_netclass_svg/README.md)<br>Render net-class-highlighted PcbDoc SVG review pages | pcbdoc, svg, design | Load the RT Super C1 project with AltiumDesign, render routed copper layers for each PCB net class, recolor SVG primitives from embedded net-class metadata, and write inline HTML review pages. | pcbdoc, svg, rendering, project, net-class, html |

| [`pcbdoc_add_track`](../../examples/pcbdoc_add_track/README.md)<br>Add PCB tracks | pcbdoc, mutation | Load a blank PcbDoc, add tracks on copper, overlay, and mechanical layers with several widths and net assignments, and save the board. | pcbdoc, mutation, track, routing, nets |

| [`schdoc_mutate_sheet_symbol`](../../examples/schdoc_mutate_sheet_symbol/README.md)<br>Mutate an existing sheet symbol group in a SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, hierarchy | Open a schematic with one existing sheet symbol group, rename and reorder entries, replace the name and file labels, add and remove entries, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, sheet-symbol, sheet-entry, hierarchy |
| [`schdoc_clear_template`](../../examples/schdoc_clear_template/README.md)<br>Clear template graphics from an existing SchDoc | schdoc, mutation, template | Open a schematic with embedded template graphics, remove the template record and template-owned objects, clear sheet template metadata, and save the modified SchDoc. | schdoc, mutation, template, title-block |

| [`schdoc_extract_template`](../../examples/schdoc_extract_template/README.md)<br>Extract an embedded SchDoc template to SchDot | schdoc, mutation, template | Open a schematic with an embedded template, extract the template graphics back to a standalone SchDot, and save the extracted template. | schdoc, mutation, template, schdot, title-block, extract |

| [`outjob_runner`](../../examples/outjob_runner/README.md)<br>Run an Altium OutJob from Python | outjob, prjpcb, automation | Stage a working copy of the RT Super C1 project, resolve its associated OutJob through prj.outjob(), and optionally launch Altium Designer to run it. | project, outjob, runner, automation, altium-launcher |
| [`schdoc_extract_images`](../../examples/schdoc_extract_images/README.md)<br>Extract embedded images from a SchDoc | schdoc, asset-extraction, image | Open a schematic, find embedded IMAGE records, write each embedded payload using a detected native extension, and save a JSON extraction manifest. | schdoc, image, embedded-image, asset-extraction |
| [`schdoc_extract_schlib`](../../examples/schdoc_extract_schlib/README.md)<br>Extract SchLibs from a SchDoc | schdoc, schlib, asset-extraction | Extract placed component symbols from a schematic as a combined SchLib, split DBLib-ready SchLibs with metadata/model records stripped, and split SchLibs with parameters and implementations preserved. | schdoc, schlib, component, symbol-extraction, dblib |
| [`schlib_find_symbol`](../../examples/schlib_find_symbol/README.md)<br>Find symbols across SchLib files | schlib | Scan a folder of SchLib files, build a library-to-symbol index, print all discovered symbols, and demonstrate fuzzy symbol search. | schlib, symbol, search, index, fuzzy-match |

| [`schlib_merge`](../../examples/schlib_merge/README.md)<br>Merge SchLib files | schlib | Scan a folder of SchLib files, merge all symbols into one combined SchLib, and write a merge manifest. | schlib, symbol, merge, library |
| [`intlib_extract_sources`](../../examples/intlib_extract_sources/README.md)<br>Extract source libraries from an IntLib | intlib, schlib, pcblib | Open an Altium integrated library, extract its embedded SchLib and PcbLib source files, and write an extraction manifest. | intlib, library, source-extraction, schlib, pcblib |

| [`schdoc_svg`](../../examples/schdoc_svg/README.md)<br>Render project schematics to SVG | schdoc, svg, prjpcb | Open the Hydroscope PrjPcb, pass project parameters into the schematic SVG renderer, and write one SVG per schematic page. | schdoc, svg, rendering, project, parameters |
| [`schlib_svg`](../../examples/schlib_svg/README.md)<br>Extract and render SchLib symbols to SVG | schdoc, schlib, svg | Extract a combined SchLib from the RT Super C1 schematic, iterate every symbol and symbol part, render each part to SVG, and write a manifest of generated symbol artwork. | schdoc, schlib, svg, rendering, symbol-extraction, multipart |
